ValidationRule.description: #1104786 AS Requests adjustments Advisory_Services_Request can't be change to Completed/Closed Won/Initiated - Future deliveries remaining with Closed Lost Opportunity
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Status__c ), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Advisory_Services_Request", Opportunity_Stage__c = 'Closed Lost', OR( ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Completed'), ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Initiated - Future deliveries remaining'), ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Closed Won') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Status cannot be Closed Won, Complete, or Initiated for Closed Lost Opportunity.
